description: Model and related behavior controls appear in both the profile editor and global settings without strong UI language explaining precedence or override behavior.
expected: Users should be able to answer 'global default or profile override?' from the UI itself.
actual: Both surfaces are easy to find, but users must infer which setting will apply next.
suggested_fix: Add explicit scope labels such as 'Default for all chats' and 'Overrides when this profile is selected.'
